buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
english_summary: NHS National Services Scotland is procuring a range of central venous catheters and related vascular access devices including coated and non-coated CVCs, PICC lines, arterial lines, dialysis catheters, and associated accessories. The framework covers 17 lots including both adult and paediatric products, with specific lots for innovation and accessories.
what_they_want: Coated Central Venous Catheters (CVC), Non-Coated Central Venous Catheters, Paediatric Central Venous Catheters, Midline Catheters, Skin Tunnelling Catheters, PICC Lines (Antimicrobial), PICC Lines (Non-Coated), Seldinger arterial lines, Non-Seldinger Arterial Cannulas, IV Flush Saline Pre-filled Syringes, Stabilisation Devices, Dialysis Central Venous Catheters, Implantable Ports, Central Venous Catheter Insertion Packs, and related accessories and innovation products.
evaluation_criteria: Framework includes 14 scored lots (Lots 1-14) and unscored lots for accessories, innovation, and additional products. Suppliers must meet all mandatory requirements and tender against scored lots to be awarded framework positions. Access to unscored accessory lots requires successful award to at least one scored lot.

original_title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply, installation, maintenance, servicing and repair of a comprehensive range of diagnostic imaging and therapy equipment across Scotland's healthcare system. The procurement covers both new equipment and ongoing maintenance services (OEM and third-party), as well as associated consumables including injectors, syringes, and mammography devices.
what_they_want: Bladder scanners; contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors with syringes and consumables; diagnostic imaging equipment including X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators; mammography vacuum devices, non-wire lesion localisation detectors and devices, sentinel lymph node location detectors and non-radioactive tracer fluids; specimen cabinets; digital systems for scoliosis; Angiography equipment; mobile units or modular builds. Services include supply, installation (including turnkey pre-installation works), OEM and third-party maintenance, servicing and repair.

english_summary: NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde is procuring one Linear Accelerator to replace aging equipment that has reached end of life at the Beatson Satellite facility located at University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire.
what_they_want: One (1) Linear Accelerator (Radiotherapy Linac) for replacement of end-of-life equipment

original_title: NHSDG Estates & Property ICES LOLER Inspection
english_summary: This tender is for LOLER (Lifting Operations and Lifting Equipment Regulations 1998) inspection services to be conducted at approximately 300 private residences throughout the Dumfries and Galloway region as part of the Integrated Community Equipment Service, which provides equipment and adaptations for people with illness or disability to remain independent at home.
what_they_want: LOLER inspection services for lifting equipment installed in individual households under the Integrated Community Equipment Service; inspections to be conducted at approximately 300 private residences throughout the region.

original_title: Provision of Internal and External Hand / Grab Rails
english_summary: North Ayrshire Council is seeking to procure internal and external hand/grab rails through an open tender process. This is a straightforward procurement for safety and accessibility equipment to be installed in council properties or facilities.
what_they_want: Internal and external hand rails and grab rails
